title: Check if Numbers Are Ascending in a Sentence
titleCn: 检查句子中的数字是否递增

testcases.input: s = "1 box has 3 blue 4 red 6 green and 12 yellow marbles" Output: true Explanation: The numbers in s are: 1, 3, 4, 6, 12. They are strictly increasing from left to right: 1 < 3 < 4 < 6 < 12.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The numbers in s are: 1, 3, 4, 6, 12. They are strictly increasing from left to right: 1 < 3 < 4 < 6 < 12.

testcases.input: s = "hello world 5 x 5" Output: false Explanation: The numbers in s are: 5, 5. They are not strictly increasing.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The numbers in s are: 5, 5. They are not strictly increasing.

testcases.input: s = "sunset is at 7 51 pm overnight lows will be in the low 50 and 60 s" Output: false Explanation: The numbers in s are: 7, 51, 50, 60. They are not strictly increasing.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The numbers in s are: 7, 51, 50, 60. They are not strictly increasing.
